text.div: CC: 65yo M with HTN, DM2 presenting for routine follow-up. BP 138/84, HR 72, RR 16, SpO2 98% RA. Weight 89kg. A1c 7.2% (improved). LDL 98. Medications: metformin 1000mg BID, lisinopril 10mg QD, atorvastatin 40mg QD. No chest pain, dyspnea, or edema. Exam unremarkable. A/P: DM2 controlled, HTN at goal. Continue current regimen. Repeat labs in 3 months. Influenza vaccine administered.
